phase_description: Investigate — compute Goldstone spectrum of multi-species fracton condensation
current_frontier: Standard Model gauge forces from fracton substrate
learnings: All three evaluation agents (Plausibility, Novelty, Feasibility) unanimously selected MSFC
KK Fractons approach is too close to Bulmash-Barkeshli 2018 (rank-2 Higgs mechanism)
Defect-mediated approach can only produce U(1), not non-abelian groups
Chirality is a cross-cutting concern for all fracton-based SM emergence approaches
